care.summary: Aromatic herb essential in Vietnamese cuisine; grows vigorously in moist conditions.
care.water: Keep consistently moist; thrives in wet feet
care.soil: Rich, moist soil; can grow in water
common_issues: Leggy growth in too much shade
tips: Grows well in a jar of water on a windowsill
Use fresh in salads and soups
Can be propagated from cuttings easily
